testcase.name: test_kessel_resourcescope_host_object_permissions
testcase.system-out: ['DEBUG:advisor-log:Started InsightsRBACPermission.has_permission', 'DEBUG:advisor-log:InsightsRBACPermission has_permission() check starting', 'DEBUG:advisor-log:KESSEL: ResourceScope is HOST - defer to has_object_permission']
testcase.system-err: Returning default value for feature: advisor.kessel_enabled Error checking feature flag: 'advisor.kessel_enabled'
